name: Disk Space Guardian
description: Intelligent, safety-first disk management for developer workstations (Rust CLI `dsg` + AgentSkills.io SKILL.md + optional MCP server). Currently spec-only.
stack_note: Declared Rust workspace in the spec; no Cargo.toml scaffolded yet. Build/test/lint commands below are targets and will not run until the workspace is created.

agents_config.notes: OpenSpec initialized for claude/kimi/opencode/codex via `.claude`, `.kimi`, `.opencode`, `.codex`. Zed and other AGENTS.md-following agents read root AGENTS.md (mirrors CLAUDE.md). mmx excluded (media-generation CLI, not a coding agent).
